children.name: Phacellophora
children.description: Phacellophora — a genus of phacellophorid jellyfish in the family Phacellophoridae.

children.name: Phacellophora ambigua
children.description: Phacellophora ambigua — a species in the genus Phacellophora, family Phacellophoridae. Also known as phacellophorid jellyfish.

children.name: Phacellophora camtschatica
children.description: Phacellophora camtschatica — a species in the genus Phacellophora, family Phacellophoridae. Also known as phacellophorid jellyfish.

children.name: Phacellophora ornata
children.description: Phacellophora ornata — a species in the genus Phacellophora, family Phacellophoridae. Also known as phacellophorid jellyfish.
